source_pr.title: log-backup: restore the merge small backup files.
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #36924

Problem Summary:
backup-stream in TiKV will merged the backup files in each flush, so br in TiDB need to be able to restore the merged files.

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Nondeterministic ordering: schema/table name lists derived from map iteration caused flaky assertions.
failure_signature: Schema/table name list order nondeterministic; missing sort before assertion.
root_cause_explanation: The tests compared schema/table name lists with a fixed order, but the underlying list construction can be affected by Go map iteration order. The fix sorts the name slices before asserting equality.
fix_pattern: Sort name lists (e.g., sort.Strings) before asserting equality.

analysis:
PR title: log-backup: restore the merge small backup files.
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/36925
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal, determinism_stabilization
Triage summary: +build:race --config=ci | sort.Strings(tableNames) (ddl/schematracker/info_store_test.go)
Changed files (15): br/pkg/restore/client.go, br/pkg/restore/client_test.go, br/pkg/restore/import.go, br/pkg/restore/log_client_test.go, br/pkg/restore/stream_metas.go, br/pkg/restore/stream_metas_test.go, br/pkg/storage/azblob.go, br/pkg/stream/BUILD.bazel, br/pkg/stream/rewrite_meta_rawkv.go, br/pkg/stream/stream_mgr.go, br/pkg/stream/util.go, br/pkg/stream/util_test.go, br/pkg/task/stream.go, br/pkg/task/stream_test.go, go.mod
Patch url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/36925.patch
Picked test: type=realtikv path=tests/realtikvtest/pessimistictest/pessimistic_test.go name=pessimistic_test
